channel.title: TACO | Trump Always Chickens Out
channel.description: A live-data daily tracker of market pressure, financial stress, and TACO-style retreat conditions.

item.title: 2026-06-26 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 26.81
item.description: Daily pressure check for 2026-06-26: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 26.81/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as equity signal and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.

item.title: 2026-06-25 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 20.60
item.description: Daily pressure check for 2026-06-25: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 20.60/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and volatility shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.

item.description: Daily pressure check for 2026-06-22: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 21.09/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. A positive 5-session S&P move also added equity relief. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
